name: Child Pickup Alert
description: When a child checks in, instantly notifies the assigned parent/guardian via push and SMS with the child's classroom and pickup code. Escalates to a care case if no parent is reachable.

nodeConfig.body: Hi {{parentFirstName}}! {{childFirstName}} just checked in at {{churchName}}. Classroom: {{roomName}}. Pickup code: {{pickupCode}}. Please keep this code safe.

nodeConfig.title: {{childFirstName}} is checked in
nodeConfig.body: Classroom {{roomName}} — Pickup code {{pickupCode}}

nodeConfig.title: Child checked in — no parent contact on file: {{childFullName}}

nodeConfig.message: Child pickup alert sent for {{childFullName}} at {{serviceName}}

name: Volunteer No-Show Alert
description: Runs 30 minutes before each Sunday service. If a scheduled volunteer hasn't checked in, alerts the team lead via SMS and push so they can find a replacement before service starts.

nodeConfig.body: URGENT: {{firstName}} ({{volunteerRole}}) has NOT checked in for {{serviceName}} starting in 30 min. Replacement needed.

name: Background Check Expiring
description: Runs monthly. For volunteers whose background check expires within 30 days, sends a renewal email plus push reminder. Creates an urgent care case if expired so they're pulled from the kids/youth schedule.

nodeConfig.title: EXPIRED background check — {{firstName}} {{lastName}}. Remove from kids/youth schedule immediately.

nodeConfig.subject: Your background check expires soon — {{churchName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your background check for {{churchName}} expires in {{backgroundCheckDaysRemaining}} days. To keep serving with our kids and youth, please renew before {{backgroundCheckExpiresAt}}.

Renew here: {{renewalLink}}

Thank you for keeping our kids safe.

— {{churchName}} Safety Team

nodeConfig.title: Background check expiring soon
nodeConfig.body: Renew within {{backgroundCheckDaysRemaining}} days to keep serving.

name: Lockdown Drill Notification
description: Manually triggered by an admin to start a campus-wide safety drill. Sends push, SMS, and in-app alerts to all staff and security volunteers, with a pastor approval gate to confirm before going live.

nodeConfig.message: Confirm: send LOCKDOWN DRILL alert to all staff and security volunteers at {{churchName}} right now?

nodeConfig.title: LOCKDOWN DRILL — {{churchName}}
nodeConfig.body: This is a DRILL. Begin lockdown procedure at {{campusName}} now. Report status in 5 min.
[DRILL] {{churchName}}: Lockdown drill in progress at {{campusName}}. Secure all entrances. Reply READY when in position.

name: Incident Report Triage
description: Accepts incident reports from the safety form webhook (suspicious person, unattended bag, medical, etc.) and routes them by severity: critical incidents create an urgent care case and SMS the security lead; lower-severity ones log a task for follow-up.

nodeConfig.body: CRITICAL incident at {{churchName}} — {{trigger.incidentType}} reported at {{trigger.location}}. Reporter: {{trigger.reporterName}} ({{trigger.reporterPhone}}). Respond immediately.

nodeConfig.message: New incident report ({{trigger.severity}}): {{trigger.incidentType}} — see Safety dashboard.

name: Snow Day Service Cancellation
description: Every Sunday at 4am, checks if it's snowing at your church location. If yes, pauses for pastor approval, then blasts an SMS, email, and push notification to the entire congregation announcing the cancellation.

nodeConfig.message: Heavy snow detected at the church. Cancel today's Sunday service and send the blast to all members?

nodeConfig.body: {{churchName}}: Sunday service is CANCELLED today due to snow. Stay safe and warm. We'll see you next Sunday!

nodeConfig.subject: Service Cancelled — Snow Day at {{churchName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Due to heavy snow this morning, we've made the difficult call to cancel today's service. Your safety is our priority — please stay home and warm.

We'll be live-streaming a short devotional later today. See you next Sunday!

— Pastoral Team

nodeConfig.title: Service Cancelled
nodeConfig.body: Today's service at {{churchName}} is cancelled due to snow. Stay safe!

nodeConfig.message: Sunday service cancelled due to snow — blast sent to congregation

name: Heat Wave Outdoor Event Warning
description: When someone RSVPs to an outdoor event, waits until the day before, then checks the forecast. If temperatures are above 95F, sends a heat-safety SMS and email reminding them to bring water, sunscreen, and dress for the heat.

nodeConfig.body: Heads up {{firstName}} — tomorrow's outdoor event is going to be a scorcher (95F+). Bring water, sunscreen, and a hat. We'll have shade and cold drinks too!

nodeConfig.subject: Heat Advisory for Tomorrow's Event
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We're excited to see you tomorrow! Quick heads-up: the forecast is calling for 95F+ temperatures.

Please bring:
- A reusable water bottle
- Sunscreen (SPF 30+)
- A hat or visor
- Light, breathable clothing

We'll have shaded areas, ice water stations, and a first-aid tent on site.

Stay cool and see you tomorrow!
— {{churchName}} Events Team

nodeConfig.subject: Looking forward to seeing you tomorrow!

name: Storm Preparation Alert
description: Runs every weekday afternoon, checks for incoming storms at the church location, and if severe weather is detected creates an urgent task for the facilities team to secure the building and alerts the staff.

nodeConfig.title: URGENT: Storm prep — secure outdoor signage, lock down garbage bins, check sump pumps, bring inside any decor

nodeConfig.message: Severe weather detected for {{churchName}}. Facilities task created. Review evening event schedule for possible postponement.

nodeConfig.body: {{churchName}} STAFF: Storm system moving in. Facilities task created in app. Please check on any evening programs that may need to be cancelled.

nodeConfig.message: Storm prep workflow triggered — facilities + staff alerted

name: Cold Weather Outreach Alert
description: Runs every winter morning and checks if temperatures have dropped below freezing (32F). If so, alerts the outreach team to mobilize blanket drives, opens the warming-center care case, and pings volunteers tagged for cold-weather outreach.

nodeConfig.title: Cold weather outreach — activate warming center & blanket drive

nodeConfig.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's below freezing today. Can you help with our cold-weather outreach this evening? Reply YES to join the team. — {{churchName}}

nodeConfig.title: Cold Weather Outreach Active
nodeConfig.body: Temps below 32F — warming center activated. Sign up to help.

name: Event RSVP Weather-Aware Reminder
description: When someone RSVPs to any event, waits until the day before, then sends a tailored reminder email that adjusts its tone based on the forecast — rain advisory if wet, normal reminder if clear — so attendees show up prepared.

nodeConfig.subject: Tomorrow's event — bring an umbrella!
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Looking forward to seeing you at tomorrow's event! Heads up — the forecast is calling for rain, so grab an umbrella and maybe a light rain jacket.

We'll have covered areas and hot coffee ready. See you tomorrow!

— {{churchName}}
Rain in the forecast for tomorrow's event at {{churchName}} — bring an umbrella! See you there, {{firstName}}.

nodeConfig.subject: See you tomorrow at {{churchName}}!
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Just a quick reminder about tomorrow's event. The weather is looking great — perfect for getting together.

Can't wait to see you!

— {{churchName}}

name: Lapsed Donor Re-engagement
description: When a previously generous donor hasn't given in 60+ days, sends a heartfelt 'we miss your partnership' email, tags them for the stewardship team, and creates a pastoral follow-up task if their lapse exceeds 90 days.

nodeConfig.subject: We miss your partnership, {{firstName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed it's been a little while since your last gift to {{churchName}}, and we wanted to reach out — not with a guilt trip, but with gratitude. Your generosity has helped fund missions, care for families, and keep our doors open for the community.

If anything has changed and you'd like to talk, we're here. If you'd like to give again, you can do so anytime in the app.

With love,
The {{churchName}} Team

nodeConfig.title: Personal stewardship call to {{firstName}} {{lastName}} (90+ day lapse)

name: Tithing Tier Promotion
description: When a donation comes in, checks the member's annual giving and automatically promotes them to Bronze ($500), Silver ($2,500), or Gold ($10,000) tier with a badge, tag, and personal thank-you from the pastor.

nodeConfig.subject: {{firstName}}, you've reached a new giving milestone!
nodeConfig.body:
Dear {{firstName}},

Thank you. Truly. Your faithful generosity to {{churchName}} this year has unlocked a new stewardship tier, and we wanted to personally recognize you.

This isn't about a number — it's about the lives you're helping us reach. Thank you for partnering with us.

Grace and peace,
Pastor

name: Fundraiser Goal Reached Celebration
description: When a fundraiser hits its goal (via webhook from the fundraiser engine), broadcasts a celebration push notification, emails all donors a thank-you, logs the milestone, and creates a care case for the team to plan public recognition.

nodeConfig.title: We did it!
nodeConfig.body: {{trigger.fundraiserName}} just hit its goal at {{churchName}}! Tap to celebrate with us.

nodeConfig.subject: We hit the goal — thank you!
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Incredible news. Together, we just reached the goal for {{trigger.fundraiserName}}! Because of donors like you, {{churchName}} can move forward with this work.

We'll share what's next soon. For now — thank you, thank you, thank you.

With gratitude,
The {{churchName}} Team

name: Stewardship 4-Week Drip Series
description: A 4-week biblical teaching series on generosity delivered weekly by email. Pastor launches it manually for a tagged group; each week's email is auto-spaced 7 days apart and ends by tagging completers as 'Stewardship Graduate'.

nodeConfig.subject: Week 1: Why Generosity Matters
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Welcome to our 4-week journey on biblical generosity at {{churchName}}. This week we're starting with the heart behind giving — why God invites us into generosity in the first place.

Read this week's devotional: [link]

See you next week,
Pastor

nodeConfig.subject: Week 2: The First Tenth
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

This week we dig into the principle of the tithe — what it meant in scripture and what it means for us today. This isn't about rules; it's about trust.

Read this week's devotional: [link]

Blessings,
Pastor

nodeConfig.subject: Week 3: Giving Beyond the Tithe
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

What does extravagant generosity look like? This week we explore offerings, sacrificial giving, and how God multiplies what's surrendered.

Read this week's devotional: [link]

Pastor

nodeConfig.subject: Week 4: A Generous Life
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We've made it to the final week. Today we're talking about generosity as a lifestyle — how money is just one expression of a heart fully given to God.

Thank you for journeying with us. If this series moved you, we'd love to hear about it.

With love,
Pastor

name: Tax Statement Delivery
description: Every January 15, automatically emails annual contribution statements to anyone who gave $25 or more last year, with download instructions. Donors below the threshold get a thank-you note instead.

nodeConfig.subject: Your {{churchName}} {{lastYear}} Tax Statement
nodeConfig.body:
Dear {{firstName}},

Thank you for your faithful generosity to {{churchName}} in the past year. Your official contribution statement is ready.

To download your statement:
1. Open the {{churchName}} app
2. Tap Giving > Tax Statements
3. Select last year and tap Download

If you have any questions, just reply to this email and our team will help.

With gratitude,
The {{churchName}} Team

nodeConfig.subject: Thank you for giving to {{churchName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thank you for your gift to {{churchName}} last year. While your total was below the IRS threshold for a formal statement, your generosity still mattered — every gift fuels what God is doing here.

Grateful for you,
The {{churchName}} Team

name: Discipleship Class Graduation
description: When a member completes the full discipleship track, automatically awards their graduation badge, adds them to the Alumni group, and sends a celebratory email from the pastor. Skips the badge step if they already have it.

nodeConfig.subject: You did it, {{firstName}} — discipleship graduate!
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We are so proud of you for completing every stage of discipleship at {{churchName}}. This is a huge milestone in your walk with Christ.

You have been added to our Alumni group, where we will continue investing in you and inviting you into leadership opportunities. Your graduation badge is now visible on your profile.

Keep going.

Pastor

name: First-Step Bible Reading Plan Nudge
description: Two weeks after someone joins, checks if they have been engaging with the app. If engagement is low or inactive, sends a gentle push notification with a 7-day Bible reading plan to help them take their next spiritual step.

nodeConfig.title: A 7-day reading plan for you, {{firstName}}
nodeConfig.body: We picked a short Bible reading plan to help you take the next step in your faith at {{churchName}}. Tap to start.

nodeConfig.message: {{firstName}} is already engaged — skipped reading-plan nudge

name: Group Leader Birthday Recognition
description: Runs daily and finds members tagged as group_leader whose birthday is today. Sends them a personal email from the pastor plus a quick SMS thank-you — small touch that keeps your volunteer leaders feeling seen.

nodeConfig.subject: Happy birthday, {{firstName}} — from your {{churchName}} family
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

On behalf of everyone at {{churchName}}, happy birthday! Leading a group is one of the most generous things a person can do, and we do not take it lightly. Thank you for pouring into people week after week.

Praying blessings over your year ahead.

Pastor
Happy birthday, {{firstName}}! Thank you for leading at {{churchName}} — we are praying for an amazing year for you.

name: Quarterly Spiritual Check-In Survey
description: On the first of every quarter, emails every active member a short spiritual check-in survey. Inactive members get a softer re-engagement email instead, so nobody feels guilted for being away.

nodeConfig.subject: How is your walk with God going, {{firstName}}?
We have been thinking about you, {{firstName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

It has been a while since we have seen you, and we just wanted you to know we have not forgotten about you. No pressure, no expectations — just a reminder that there is a seat for you at {{churchName}} whenever you are ready.

If you ever want to talk, hit reply.

Pastor

name: Mentor-Mentee Pairing Workflow
description: When a member submits the mentorship-interest form, immediately creates a high-priority task for the discipleship pastor to pair them, tags the member as mentee_pending, and sends them an acknowledgment so they don't feel ignored while staff works on a match.

nodeConfig.subject: We're already on it, {{firstName}}
We received your request, {{firstName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks for stepping forward — asking for a mentor takes courage. Our discipleship pastor will personally review your interests and pair you within the next 7 days. You will hear from your mentor directly once we have a match.

In the meantime, we are praying for you.

{{churchName}}

nodeConfig.message: New mentee request from {{firstName}} {{lastName}} — review in tasks.

name: Weekly Staff Report
description: Every Monday at 8am, generates an engagement report and emails it to the church staff group with a follow-up task to review key metrics before the staff meeting.

nodeConfig.subject: Weekly Staff Briefing — {{churchName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Good morning team,

Your weekly engagement, attendance, and giving reports are attached. Please review before our 10am staff meeting.

Grace and peace.

nodeConfig.title: Review weekly reports before staff meeting

name: New Volunteer Application Routing
description: When a volunteer application form is submitted, routes high-trust roles (kids, security, finance) through a background check task while sending lower-risk roles a fast welcome email and group assignment.

nodeConfig.subject: Next steps for your volunteer application
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks for applying to serve at {{churchName}}! Because of the role you selected, we run a quick background check. Our team will be in touch within 5 business days.

Grateful for you.

nodeConfig.subject: Welcome to the {{churchName}} volunteer team!
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

You're in! Your team leader will reach out this week with your serving schedule. We're so glad to have you.

name: Annual Membership Renewal
description: One year after a member joins, sends a renewal email, waits 7 days for response, then either tags them as Renewed or escalates to a pastor follow-up task if they're still inactive.

nodeConfig.subject: It's been a year, {{firstName}} — renew your {{churchName}} membership
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

It's hard to believe a full year has passed since you joined the {{churchName}} family. To keep your membership active, please confirm your renewal by clicking the link below.

With gratitude,
The {{churchName}} Team

nodeConfig.subject: Thanks for renewing, {{firstName}}!
nodeConfig.body: Your membership at {{churchName}} is renewed for another year. Thank you for being part of our family.

nodeConfig.title: Personally follow up with {{firstName}} — pending renewal

name: Bulk SMS for Service Time Change
description: Manually triggered broadcast that filters to active members with a phone number and sends an SMS announcing a service time change — perfect for last-minute weather or schedule shifts.

nodeConfig.body: Hi {{firstName}}! Heads up — {{churchName}} service time has changed this Sunday. Please check the app or our website for the new time. See you there!

nodeConfig.title: Service Time Update
nodeConfig.body: {{churchName}} service time has changed this Sunday — tap for details.

nodeConfig.subject: Service Time Change at {{churchName}}
nodeConfig.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We don't have a phone number on file for you, so heads up via email — our service time has changed this Sunday. Please visit our website for the new schedule.

name: Pastor Care Case Backlog Alert
description: Every Friday at 5pm, checks the open pastoral care case count and notifies the senior pastor (with an urgent task) if more than 5 cases are still unresolved heading into the weekend.

nodeConfig.message: Heads up — there are {{context.openCareCases}} open care cases heading into the weekend. Please review before Sunday.

nodeConfig.title: Triage {{context.openCareCases}} open care cases before Sunday service

nodeConfig.body: Pastor — {{context.openCareCases}} open care cases need attention before Sunday. Task assigned in Shepard.

nodeConfig.message: Friday care backlog check — under threshold, no alert sent
